variants: Salma Khoury is an accomplished Neuropsychology specialist whose work is pushing the boundaries of understanding in the field. Guided by her doctoral advisor, Caroline Rohrbach, Salma has developed a robust research portfolio supported by the Canopy Prism Alliance, her primary funding source. She obtained a professional license known as Circuit Masquerader Registration, which highlights her qualifications. Salma's significant contributions to academic literature are showcased through her publications in Threaded Sage Editions, evidencing her commitment to advancing knowledge in neuropsychology.
